author: krisspy
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Launch OpenCode CLI terminal sessions and browse conversation history without leaving your vault.

name: OpenCode

releases.author: kriss-spy
releases.description: Bugfix release: corrected plugin id from opencode-beta to opencode for community plugin registry compatibility.
releases.name: 1.2.1 - Fix plugin id

releases.author: kriss-spy
releases.description:
## What's New

### WebSocket Editor Server (#4)
- Auto-discovers vault as an OpenCode editor via lock file
- JSON-RPC handshake with initialize / notifications/initialized
- Sends at_mentioned messages on file drop
- Lazy start/stop tied to terminal view lifecycle

### Drag and Drop Improvements (#1, #2, #3)
- Single internal note drops via dragManager
- External OS file drops via dataTransfer.files fallback
- Multi-file drops with staggered delivery
- Vault-relative path normalization
- No PTY keystroke injection — pure WebSocket protocol

### Technical
- Added ws dependency for WebSocket server
- 16 tests passing
- Production build verified in Electron Node.js context
releases.name: 1.2.0 - WebSocket Editor Server

releases.author: kriss-spy
releases.description: Fix release assets for Obsidian plugin review

releases.author: kriss-spy
releases.description:
## Changes

- Auto-focus terminal on open (not on every click)
- Toggle sidebar uses rightSplit.toggle() to preserve PTY session
- Block all Obsidian shortcuts when terminal focused, forward keys to PTY
- Re-focus terminal after Escape (opencode blur workaround)
- Remove terminalTheme setting (dead code)
- Remove autoRestoreSessions setting (never implemented)
- Remove empty modals/ directory
- Fix xterm WebGL addon dispose error

releases.author: kriss-spy
releases.description:
Fixes for Obsidian community plugin review:
- Replaced deprecated builtin-modules with Node.js module.builtinModules
- Removed !important declarations from CSS
- Merged duplicate CSS selectors
releases.name: v1.0.1 - Review Fixes
